name: Potato Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a mixer bowl.
2. Beat on medium speed for 1-2 minutes, scraping the bowl often.
3. Form into 1-inch balls.
4. Drop the dumplings into hot broth and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Remove the dumplings with a slotted spoon as they float to the surface.
6. Serve hot.
